message:
fix(engine): guard against double-deopt in array fast lane and expand ambient authority patterns

Array fast lane:
- Add early-return guard in ArrayLaneDescriptor::deopt() when
  fast_lane_active is already false, preventing duplicate deopt records
  from being appended to already-deoptimized lanes
- Wrap all three deopt call sites in ArrayFastLaneEngine (element kind
  transition, max transitions exceeded, excessive OOB) with
  fast_lane_active checks so deopt_log only receives records from lanes
  that were actually active
- Rename test_transition_non_widening to test_transition_to_frozen_is_widening
  to match actual semantics

Ambient authority:
- Add File:: and OpenOptions:: to the forbidden pattern list (14 patterns
  total, up from 12) since direct file access bypasses capability-
  mediated FileSystemCap checks

Core module hardening:
- lowering_pipeline: improve validation and error path coverage
- stdlib: expand coverage for edge cases in stdlib operations
- third_party_verifier: strengthen verification logic and add tests
- Update enrichment integration tests across control_plane_policy,
  component_shape_catalog, module_compatibility_matrix,
  promise_model, queueing_admission_control, support_surface,
  and supremacy_cell_matrix modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
